auth.label: Master Key
auth.description: JSONBin.io master key sent with the X-Master-Key header. Open your JSONBin API Keys page to view or create keys: https://jsonbin.io/app/api-keys.

actions.name: create_bin
actions.description: Create a JSONBin bin from a JSON object and return the stored record plus bin metadata.

record.description: The JSON object stored in the bin. JSONBin bins store object records.

name.description: Optional bin name sent with the X-Bin-Name header.

collectionId.description: Optional collection id sent with the X-Collection-Id header.

private.description: Whether the bin should be private.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a JSONBin bin.

record.description: The JSON object stored in the bin. JSONBin bins store object records.

metadata.description: Metadata returned by JSONBin for the bin, such as id, name, private flag, timestamps, version, or collection id.

actions.name: delete_bin
actions.description: Delete a JSONBin bin and return the deletion metadata returned by JSONBin.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a JSONBin bin.

metadata.description: Metadata returned by JSONBin for the bin, such as id, name, private flag, timestamps, version, or collection id.

actions.name: read_bin
actions.description: Read the latest or a specific version of a JSONBin bin.

version.description: Optional JSONBin version identifier to read.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading a JSONBin bin.

record.description: The JSON object stored in the bin. JSONBin bins store object records.

metadata.description: Metadata returned by JSONBin for the bin, such as id, name, private flag, timestamps, version, or collection id.

actions.name: update_bin
actions.description: Replace the JSON object stored in a JSONBin bin and return the updated record plus bin metadata.

record.description: The JSON object stored in the bin. JSONBin bins store object records.

versioning.description: Whether JSONBin should create a new version for this update.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating a JSONBin bin.

record.description: The JSON object stored in the bin. JSONBin bins store object records.

metadata.description: Metadata returned by JSONBin for the bin, such as id, name, private flag, timestamps, version, or collection id.
